127 
PRVDR_TAX_NAME 
LABEL: 
Provider Tax (IRS) Name 
DESCRIPTION: The name that the provider entity uses on Internal Revenue Service (IRS) tax filings; most recent in the 
calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_TAX_NAME 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_TAX_NAME 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
150 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Text string (e.g., UNIVERSAL CLINICS
